sections.label: Lyrics
lines: First sky flickers out tonight
Old world breathing its last light
Hear the silence where the waves used to break
Just a memory, for goodness sake...
Yeah, just a memory we don't have to retake
Then a whisper, soft and low
Says "I'm right here, watch it go...
All the static, all the fear..."
Something new is drawing near...
Feel it drawing near
He'll wipe away every tear I've cried
No more death hiding deep inside
No more mourning, no more crying out
No more pain, anymore, no doubt
'Cause the former things have passed away
Passed away... yeah, passed away
Then a new heaven starts to bloom
Washing clean the empty room
A new earth answers soft and deep
Promises the old world couldn't keep...
And the restless ocean falls asleep...
Forever falls asleep...
See the city, coming down
Like a diamond, wears a crown
But it's gentle, soft, and bright
Prepared for us, bathed in light...
Washing over in the purest light
And the whisper turns to sound
Says "This here is holy ground
My own home, right here with you"
Making everything feel new...
Yeah, everything brand new
He'll wipe away every tear I've cried
No more death hiding deep inside
No more mourning, no more crying out
No more pain, anymore, no doubt
'Cause the former things have passed away
Passed away... yeah, passed away
The dwelling place... right here with us
No more hiding, only trust
He'll be our God, we'll be His own
Never, never be alone...
Seed of hope is fully grown...
He'll wipe away every tear I've cried
No more death hiding deep inside
No more mourning, no more crying out
No more pain, anymore, no doubt
'Cause the former things have passed away
Passed away... yeah, passed away
Passed away...
New heaven... new earth...
No more tears... anymore...
No more pain...
Passed away...
